prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.5 kg; Height 165.9 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 197mg/dL; 9 months ago 221mg/dL; 6 months ago 203mg/dL; 3 months ago 176mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 64.7kg; 9 months ago 66.2kg; 6 months ago 66.9kg; 3 months ago 66.3kg; current 68.5kg), Height (12 months ago 165.9cm; 9 months ago 165.9cm; 6 months ago 165.9cm; 3 months ago 165.9cm; current 165.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 103U/L; 9 months ago 104U/L; 6 months ago 103U/L; 3 months ago 96U/L; current 98U/L), AST (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 104U/L; 6 months ago 104U/L; 3 months ago 104U/L; current 105U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 156mg/g; 9 months ago 151mg/g; 6 months ago 136mg/g; 3 months ago 138mg/g; current 106mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 132mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 133mg/dL; 3 months ago 132mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.7g/dL; 9 months ago 11.3g/dL; 6 months ago 10.7g/dL; 3 months ago 11.3g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
